sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65564" key="megeqopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγεθο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n65564.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">productive of sublimity</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥυθμοί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
